strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and frameworks (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js, Kotlin/Java, DLang)
Strong background in AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows
Proven track record in scaling applications, optimizing performance, and contributing to architecture decisions
concerns: Limited direct experience with Vitest (uses Jest/Playwright elsewhere in resume)
No explicit mention of working with PostgreSQL or MySQL (focus on MongoDB and other databases)
Recent role change (re:cinq in April 2025) may indicate short tenure at current position
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep technical expertise across the required stack, particularly in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, with significant contributions to AI agent infrastructure—a highly relevant skill for modern enterprise tooling. His experience with performance optimization, architecture decisions, and diverse tech stacks is strong. Concerns include limited Vitest exposure, lack of PostgreSQL/MySQL experience, and a recent job change that may warrant further verification.
